text:
As used in this part 3, unless the context otherwise requires:

(1) “Department” means the department of revenue.

(2) “Identification card” means the identification card issued under this article.

(3) “Registrant” means a person who acquires an identification card under the provisions of this part 3.
markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 2. Drivers’ Licenses
##### § 42-2-301 — Definitions

As used in this part 3, unless the context otherwise requires:

(1) “Department” means the department of revenue.

(2) “Identification card” means the identification card issued under this article.

(3) “Registrant” means a person who acquires an identification card under the provisions of this part 3.

subsections.text: As used in this part 3, unless the context otherwise requires:
“Identification card” means the identification card issued under this article.
“Registrant” means a person who acquires an identification card under the provisions of this part 3.
